Latest from the Lab

Experiment

Florida Politics

An interactive map of how Florida has shifted politically by county — gubernatorial primaries and general elections from 1994 to 2022.

Live View →
Experiment

Where Now?

A random food and trip generator for the Lisbon area. Built for the moment when indecision wins.

Live View →
Experiment

Portuguese Phrases for Tidbyt

A Tidbyt app for passive daily exposure to European Portuguese. Small tool, genuine use.
